name: Tsutomu Goshiki
description:
Even those that are perfect have flaws

••¤(`×¤ . ¤× ́)¤••

“A wretched soul, bruised with adversity”

It was widely known. She was perfect, grades, beauty, personality. Goshiki happened to know her through volleyball.

But there was no way he could ever have her. She was definitely out of his league.

One day, he noticed a long scar running across her leg. It looked new. It couldn’t have been.. would it?
